'''shamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beautifully|beautifully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-m-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beautifully|beautifully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shamate|shamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shamatesher|shamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamatesherĂ«m|shamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shamatero|shamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamateshĂ«|shamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamateshĂ«m|shamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishamatero|gokishamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamateshĂ«|gokishamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamateshĂ«m|gokishamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshamankerom|goshamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamankeshĂ«|goshamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamankeshĂ«m|goshamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshamankeya|goshamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shamaterom|shamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamatemu|shamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shamateya|shamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishamaterom|gokishamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamatemu|gokishamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishamateya|gokishamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shamamate|shamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shamamatesher|shamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamatesherĂ«m|shamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shamamatero|shamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamamateshĂ«|shamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamateshĂ«m|shamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishamamatero|gokishamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamamateshĂ«|gokishamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamateshĂ«m|gokishamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshamamankerom|goshamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamamankeshĂ«|goshamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamankeshĂ«m|goshamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshamamankeya|goshamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shamamaterom|shamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamatemu|shamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shamamateya|shamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishamamaterom|gokishamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamatemu|gokishamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishamamateya|gokishamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠmĂŠte|shĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠmĂŠtesher|shĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠmĂŠtero|shĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠmĂŠtero|gokishĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠmĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠmĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠmĂŠterom|shĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠmĂŠtemu|shĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠmĂŠteya|shĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠmĂŠterom|gokishĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠmĂŠteya|gokishĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafmafte|shafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafmaftesher|shafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafmaftesherĂ«m|shafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafmaftero|shafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafmafteshĂ«|shafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafmafteshĂ«m|shafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafmaftero|gokishafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafmafteshĂ«|gokishafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafmafteshĂ«m|gokishafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafmafnkerom|goshafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafmafnkeshĂ«|goshafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafmafnkeshĂ«m|goshafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafmafnkeya|goshafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafmafterom|shafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafmaftemu|shafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafmafteya|shafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafmafterom|gokishafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafmaftemu|gokishafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafmafteya|gokishafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
